sessionName: Z1 easy 25 min + 6×20 s strides — LOGGED
intro: Easy + strides done. Easy 25:00 @ 9:35/mi avg, HR 161, cadence 171 spm — HR markedly cooler than W5 Mon's anomalous 179 on similar pace; supports Mon high HR being outdoor-specific (heat/stop-go) not cardiac drift.

Strides (catch-up for skipped Mon dose): 6×20s w/ ~60s walk recovery between (matches §2.A full-recovery rule). Cadence overshoot reps 3-4 (195/201 spm vs 178–182 target) — sprinting territory, broke 'fast but smooth' cue. New Adj #24 to anchor cadence next time.
Pace creep on easy continues: 9:35/mi sits below §4.A Z1 floor (9:45). Nasal-gate not reported. HR signal otherwise normal.
